about.hero.title: Leaders in Agricultural Drone Technology

about.stats.3.label: Years of experience
about.story.heading: Our Story
about.story.paragraph.0: AirAgro was founded in 2023 by a team of agronomists and drone enthusiasts with a vision to transform the way crop protection is carried out in Bulgaria.
about.story.paragraph.1: We saw Western countries shifting en masse to drone technology and realized this was the future - not only because it is more efficient, but because it is more responsible toward the environment and more cost-effective for farmers.
about.story.paragraph.2: We started with a single DJI Agras T30 and a 500-decare pilot project on a friend's farm. The results were impressive - we cut chemical use by 35%, covered the area 3 times faster than tractor equipment, and didn't trample a single crop.
about.story.paragraph.3: Today, after more than 25,000 decares treated and 47+ satisfied clients, we continue to grow and refine our services. We've invested in the DJI Agras T50, RTK systems, and ongoing training.
about.story.mission: Our mission is simple: to make precision agriculture accessible, understandable, and cost-effective for every Bulgarian farmer.
about.values.heading: Our Values
about.values.0.title: Quality and Reliability
about.values.0.description: We use only genuine DJI equipment with full warranty. Every treatment is documented with a GPS record.
about.values.1.title: Precision
about.values.1.description: RTK technology with ±10 cm accuracy delivers perfect coverage with no overlaps or gaps.
about.values.2.title: Care for the Land
about.values.2.description: We save 30-40% on chemicals and water. We never compact the soil. We work sustainably and responsibly.
about.values.3.title: Partnership Approach
about.values.3.description: We're not just contractors - we're your partner for success. We advise and help you find the optimal solutions.
about.equipment.heading: Our Equipment
about.equipment.t50.description: A professional agricultural drone from DJI with a 40 L capacity and active terrain-following system.
about.equipment.drtk.title: D-RTK 2 Base Station
about.equipment.drtk.description: A professional RTK system for centimeter-level accuracy on every job.

spraying.benefits.heading: Why Spray with a Drone?
spraying.benefits.subheading: Modern technology that is changing the way farming works
spraying.benefits.0.title: RTK Precision
spraying.benefits.0.description: ±10 cm accuracy eliminates overlaps and missed spots. Every mission is GPS-logged.
spraying.benefits.1.title: Resource Savings
spraying.benefits.1.description: 30-40% less chemicals and water thanks to ultra-low-volume technology.
spraying.benefits.2.title: No Trampling
spraying.benefits.2.description: We don't damage the crop or compact the soil — we fly above the field.
spraying.benefits.3.title: Speed
spraying.benefits.3.description: Up to 200 decares/hour effectively. We cover 100 decares in 45-60 minutes including refills.
spraying.benefits.4.title: Tall Crops
spraying.benefits.4.description: We work over corn and sunflower up to 3-4 m tall, reaching every zone.
spraying.benefits.5.title: Wet Soil

spraying.process.heading: How Does the Process Work?
spraying.process.0.title: Consultation
spraying.process.0.desc: You call or send an enquiry. We discuss the area, crop, growth stage and type of treatment.
spraying.process.1.title: Quote
spraying.process.1.desc: You receive a custom quote within 2-24 hours with exact pricing and delivery timelines.
spraying.process.2.title: Scheduling
spraying.process.2.desc: We agree on a date based on weather conditions and your agronomic programme.
spraying.process.3.title: Preparation
spraying.process.3.desc: You provide the chemicals according to the label. We mix them and load the drone.
spraying.process.4.title: Spraying
spraying.process.4.desc: We fly the mission with RTK precision. GPS records every centimetre of the treatment.
spraying.process.5.title: Documentation
spraying.process.5.desc: You receive a KML/KMZ file with the GPS log and a report of the treated area.

shading.meta.description: Drone greenhouse shading — even application of COVER X2 shading paint with no scaffolding and no manual labor. We protect crops from overheating and sun scald. Southern Bulgaria. ☎ 0884-242-406
shading.meta.ogTitle: Greenhouse Shading with a Drone | AirAgro
shading.meta.ogDescription: Even application of COVER X2 shading paint with the DJI Agras T50. No scaffolding, no manual labor. Protects crops from overheating.

shading.meta.twitterTitle: Greenhouse Shading with a Drone | AirAgro Bulgaria
shading.meta.twitterDescription: Even application of COVER X2 shading paint with the DJI Agras T50. No scaffolding, no manual labor. Protection from overheating.
shading.schema.name: Greenhouse shading with a drone
shading.schema.description: Even application of COVER X2 shading paint over greenhouses with a DJI Agras drone. Protection from overheating and solar radiation, and higher yields.
shading.schema.offer.0: Greenhouse shading with COVER X2 temporary paint
shading.schema.offer.1: Shading of glass and polycarbonate greenhouses
shading.schema.offer.3: Adjustable shading level tuned to the crop
shading.hero.subtitle: Even application of shading paint with the DJI Agras T50. No scaffolding, no manual labor — professional coverage in hours, not days.
shading.benefits.heading: Why Drone Shading?
shading.benefits.subtitle: During peak summer hours, greenhouse temperatures can exceed 50 °C. Shading protects your crops from overheating and losses.
shading.benefits.0.title: Protection from Overheating
shading.benefits.0.description: We reflect part of the solar radiation and protect crops from summer overheating and sun scald.
shading.benefits.1.title: UV Protection
shading.benefits.1.description: The shading paint reflects a broad spectrum of sunlight without depriving crops of the light they need for photosynthesis.
shading.benefits.2.title: Even Coverage
shading.benefits.2.description: Top-down application with RTK precision — a perfectly even layer with no hot spots.
shading.benefits.3.title: Speed
shading.benefits.3.description: Up to 10,000 m² per hour. A 0.5-hectare greenhouse is shaded in 30–45 minutes instead of 2–3 days.
shading.benefits.4.title: Safety
shading.benefits.4.description: No scaffolding and no climbing on roofs. Zero risk to workers — the drone works from above.
shading.benefits.5.title: Higher Yields
shading.benefits.5.description: Keeps the temperature below ~32°C — the fruit-set threshold for tomatoes and peppers — and extends the season.
shading.paintTypes.heading: The COVER X2 Paint
shading.paintTypes.subtitle: We use COVER X2 — a temporary shading paint, tuned to your crop and season
shading.paintTypes.0.title: Temporary & Self-Removing
shading.paintTypes.0.description: Applied in spring and gradually washes off on its own over 3–4 months. No separate cleaning step at the end of the season.
shading.paintTypes.1.title: For Any Greenhouse
shading.paintTypes.1.description: Suitable for glass, polycarbonate and polyethylene greenhouses. One 22 kg pack covers approximately 700–1,400 m².
shading.paintTypes.2.title: Adjustable Intensity
shading.paintTypes.2.description: The shading level is controlled by the dilution and the number of passes — we tune it to the crop.
shading.paintTypes.3.title: Drone-Friendly
shading.paintTypes.3.description: Formulated to spray without clogging, which makes it ideal for even application by drone.
shading.stats.0.label: Protection per season
shading.stats.1.label: Area coverage
shading.stats.2.label: Faster than by hand
shading.stats.3.label: RTK accuracy
shading.process.heading: How Does the Process Work?
shading.process.0.title: Survey and Planning
shading.process.0.desc: We assess the area, height, and type of covering. We prepare a flight plan with precise GPS coordinates.
shading.process.1.title: Paint Selection
shading.process.1.desc: We recommend the right type of shading paint based on the crop, season, and climate conditions.
shading.process.2.title: Mixing the Solution
shading.process.2.desc: We dilute the paint to the manufacturer's specifications and load the drone's tank.
shading.process.3.title: Automated Application
shading.process.3.desc: The drone follows the route with RTK precision. The dual atomizing system delivers an adjustable droplet size of 50–500 µm.
shading.process.4.title: Quality Control
shading.process.4.desc: We inspect the coverage and, if needed, make an additional pass for full uniformity.
shading.article.title: Learn more about the technology
shading.article.description: An in-depth guide to greenhouse shading with a drone

shading.cta.subtitle: A free survey and a tailored shading plan across all of Southern Bulgaria
